name: Evileye
description:
Evileye is an adamantite ranked adventurer and magic caster of Blue Roses as well as a former companion of the Thirteen Heroes. 

Evileye has the figure of a twelve-year-old girl. She covers herself with a reddish robe and an uncanny mask which hides her face. Because of this, she is considered an enigmatic woman by others. Due to her short stature, she is called "Shorty" by Gagaran. Evileye's young appearance is presumably due to being an immortal vampire, which caused her body to stop developing at the age of twelve.
